title: UFOs spotted in Brasilia near the President’s residence [1990]

text_preview: APRIL 2nd, 1990. Time: 21:20. Duration: 30 minutes. Five people in Brasília, Distrito Federal, reported the sighting of five unidentified flying objects making “elliptical trajectories” in the East position. According to the reporting witness, the UFOs had “various shapes, more projection for a circle”, with various colors, predominantly blue and red. When moving, slowly, the objects left “a little luminosity” as a trail. The witness also reported that the UFOs were positioned “to the left of the President’s residence and sometimes above”. The sighting was done with the naked eye and with good
summary: Five people in Brasília saw five UFOs making elliptical trajectories near the President's residence on April 2, 1990; radar detected nothing.
